title: Nailia Dindarova
compiled_truth: Nailia Dindarova is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-07-26 to 2001-11-19), Nailia Dindarova sent 6 and received 96 emails, totalling 102 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (4), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (2), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (2), [Paul Dawson](people/paul-dawson) (2), [Peter Styles](people/peter-styles) (2).
